title: Thinking/reasoning was completely broken since initial commit
description: context.thinkingLevel doesn't exist on Pi's Context type. Extension was reading the wrong field - should be options.reasoning. Thinking was NEVER enabled regardless of user settings. Fixed in commit pushed to PR #73.
notes: Fixed: now reads options.reasoning with per-level budgets. Verified thinking blocks appear in responses.

title: Root cause completeness: explore all proxy error paths
description: Run research, ce-architecture-strategist, codebase-analyzer, scope-tracer against the LiteLLM proxy to verify we handle all edge cases that could cause session deadlock
notes: Research complete. Proxy error paths fully mapped. All gaps addressed: direct overflow pattern match, timeout, stream integrity. Pushed to PR #73.

title: Fix auto-compaction when proxy returns generic 500 on context overflow
description: Pi extension doesn't trigger auto-compaction because the LEGO MPS proxy swallows Bedrock's 'prompt is too long' error into a generic HTTP 500. The extension needs to detect this and rewrite the error to match Pi's isContextOverflow() patterns. Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-18-001-fix-auto-compaction-context-overflow-plan.md
notes: Implemented and deployed. Extension now detects generic 500 + large context as overflow, rewrites error to 'prompt is too long' pattern that Pi's isContextOverflow() recognizes, triggering auto-compaction.

title: Tune AC power governor
description: Make the mahakala AC power policy slightly more performance-oriented while preserving the battery-saving TLP behavior.
close_reason: Applied AC TLP governor/platform profile tune and verified live settings.

title: Run mahakala update and fix issues
description: Run the repository just update workflow, investigate any warnings/errors/weird output it surfaces, and make targeted fixes if needed.
notes: just update completed; flake inputs updated; pursuing check/deploy warnings and requested AC TLP governor tune.
close_reason: Completed just update, verified flake and system builds, applied mahakala system, and cleaned deploy warnings where actionable.

title: Add just update-rust-tools workflow
description: Add a Justfile step that refreshes pinned Rust tool versions before system-affecting update/deploy recipes, then verify the flake still checks.
close_reason: Implemented update-rust-tools recipe and verified updated Rust package build

title: Add onPayload/onResponse extension hooks
description: Enable other Pi extensions to intercept/modify requests. Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-18-002-feat-extension-resilience-and-caching-plan.md U3
notes: Implemented: onPayload before fetch, onResponse after. Fire-and-forget with error isolation.

title: Add prompt caching via cache_control on system/tools
description: Reduce latency and cost with Anthropic ephemeral caching. Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-18-002-feat-extension-resilience-and-caching-plan.md U2
notes: Implemented: cache_control on system prompt + last tool. Verified cacheRead=10545 on second request.

title: Add retry logic for transient proxy errors (429/500/502/503)
description: Client-side retry with 2 attempts, 1s/3s backoff. Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-18-002-feat-extension-resilience-and-caching-plan.md U1
notes: Implemented: 2 retries with 1s/3s backoff for 429/500/502/503. Respects Retry-After header.

title: Deep code review: extension elegance and performance
description: Run ce-code-review, ce-adversarial-reviewer, ce-performance-oracle, ce-code-simplicity-reviewer, ce-correctness-reviewer, ce-reliability-reviewer against the anthropic-proxy extension
notes: 10-agent review complete. All critical/high findings fixed: thinking activation (P0), fetch timeout, stream integrity checks, optional chaining, message alternation, overflow detection improvements. Pushed to PR #73.
